name: French Vegetable French Dip Sandwich

ingredients.item: Two tablespoon of chopped fresh chives
A quarter cup of mushroom slices
Two cups of sliced bell peppers
One pack of French cheese slice

method: Roast the mushroom and bell pepper slices in an oven by adding the
butter, salt and pepper on it.
Toast the baguette and start lining the sub with ingredients.
Add all the ingredients one by one into the sub and then the roasted
mushrooms and bell peppers in the end.
You can serve the sandwich with any of your preferred sauce or dip.
The dish is ready to be served.
